sections.sectionTitle: Israel-te A Ngei A Batsakkik Ding Ngetna

verses.text: Tuuhon bangin Josef a paipih, Israel Tuucingpa aw, ngai in! Kherub tungah a tupa aw
Efraim, Benjamin leh Manasseh' mai-ah taangkhia in! Na tha saan in la, kote a honkhia dingin hong pai ta in
Ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik in, Pasian aw. Kote khempeuh hong kihotkhiat theihna dingin na maitang hong taangsak in
Vanglian Topa Pasian aw, na mite' thungetna-ah bang tanvei sinso niloh ding na hi hiam
Nangmah in a an dingun amaute tungah khitui na pia a, amaute' dawn dingin khitui tampi na pia hi
Nangmah in, ka vengte uh' thusim lohin kote na hong bawl a, ka galte un hong thusim loin hong nuihsan uh hi
Ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik in, Vanglian Pasian aw. Kote khempeuh hong kihotkhiat theihna dingin na maitang hong taangsak in
Nangmah in Egypt panin leenggui khat na la a, minam dangte hawlkhia-in, tua leenggui na suan hi
Nangmah in tua leenggui-a' dingin leitang na hahsiang a, amah in zungthuk kha-in gamsung a dim hi
Ama liim in mual liante hoihtakin liimsun a, a hiang in taamtak sing liante hoihtakin khuh a
tuipi lamah a hiangte zamin, a dawnngekte in Gunpi lam a zuan hi
Tua ahih ciangin, lampi-ah a pai mi khempeuh in a gah a lawhtheihna dingin, bang hangin nangmah in a daigawl suvang na hi hiam
Gamlaka om ngal in susiagawp a, zangsung sa khempeuh in kivakna-in nei uh hi
Hong kiheikik in, Vanglian Pasian aw. Vantung panin hong ensukin hong mu in. Na khut taklam in a suansa, hih leenggui hong don in
Amaute in mei tawh halin sattan gawp uh hi. Amaute heh et in la, susiagawp in
Ahih hangin nangma-a' dingin na hatsak mi' tapa, na taklama om mipa tungah na thahatna guan' in
Tua ciangin nang kiang panin ka kiheikik nawn kei ding uh hi. Kote hong nungtasak in, nang kong phat ding uh hi
Ka ngei uh hong bangsakkik in, Vanglian Topa Pasian aw. Kote khempeuh hong kihotkhiat theihna dingin na maitang hong taangsak in.
